markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard growthx.ai to Bubble's Ghost CMS publishing process.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Workflow:** growthx.ai will draft the first 2–3 articles; Bubble will review and publish to ensure correct formatting and process adherence.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Tagging is Critical:** The first tag assigned to a post determines its primary category on the blog's homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Table Style 2 is Preferred:** Use `Table Style 2` (normal header row) for versatility, as `Table Style 1` (locked left header) can break on wider screens.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Key Formatting Rules:** Use the `Callout Box` for CTAs, add simple alt text to all images, and ensure H1/H2s are *not* bolded.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

## Topics

### Publishing Workflow & Review

  - [**Process:** growthx.ai drafts → Bubble reviews & publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This initial review ensures correct formatting and validates the onboarding instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### General Post Settings

  - [**Author:** Use "Bubble" for all SEO content.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Date Published:** Update the date on any article update to keep content current.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**Slug:** Double-check the slug before publishing. Ghost has a known bug that can reset it to the title, breaking the URL.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

### Tagging Strategy

  - [**Purpose:** Tags categorize content and determine its homepage placement.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Primary Tags for SEO:** `guides`, `building a startup`, `starting a business`, `programming`.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Rule:** The first tag assigned becomes the post's primary category on the blog homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [**Example:** A post tagged `AI` and `Community` will appear under `Community` if `Community` is listed first.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Content Formatting & Blocks

  - [**Tables:**](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [Use the `/table` command to insert a pre-styled block.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Use `Table Style 2` (normal header row) for versatility.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Avoid:** `Table Style 1` (locked left header) can break on wider screens.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Custom HTML:** If using, ensure the Bubble-specific `class` line is at the top of the code block to apply the correct styling.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Headings (H1, H2):**](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [**Rule:** Do not bold headings.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Alt Text:** Required for all images; simple descriptions are sufficient.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Captions:** Optional, unless crediting a source.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Callout Box (CTAs):**](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
      - [**Purpose:** For prominent calls-to-action.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
      - [**Style:** Use the default blue background.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
      - [**Formatting:** The arrow (`→`) must be typed in a separate editor (e.g., Google Docs) and pasted, as Ghost does not auto-format `-->`.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Include UTM parameters in all final CTA links.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**growthx.ai:** Draft the first 2–3 SEO articles in Ghost.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Bubble:** Review the initial drafts for formatting and adherence to guidelines before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/nXo_ojhJPFdquzsxoybsLyQTVFm6BVvx?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
